name: FFAI Provider
description: Free-tier AI key-pooling proxy with multi-provider model discovery

baseUrl.description: FFAI server URL (e.g., http://127.0.0.1:8010). Overridden by the FFAI_URL environment variable.

favorites.description: Model IDs to include in the ffai-favorites provider group. The first entry is promoted to the default model during onboarding.

catalogSync.description: Run a one-shot sync of the FFAI model catalog into openclaw.json at gateway start. This is how the plugin populates models.providers.ffai-* — the host's providerDiscoveryEntry dispatch path does not currently invoke catalog.run for plugins that also register a runtime entry. Leave enabled unless you have a host that does dispatch correctly. Legacy alias: compatSync.

compatSync.description: Deprecated alias for catalogSync. Set catalogSync instead. Existing configs continue to work.

baseUrl.label: FFAI Server URL
baseUrl.help: URL of your FFAI key-pooling proxy (default: http://127.0.0.1:8010). FFAI_URL env var takes precedence.

favorites.label: Favorite Models
favorites.help: List of model IDs to group under ffai-favorites for quick access in /models. Leave empty to see all discovered models ungrouped.

catalogSync.label: Catalog Sync
catalogSync.help: Populates models.providers.ffai-* in openclaw.json at gateway start. Required — disabling it leaves /models empty for FFAI providers.
